title: Implement Meshtastic-compatible BLE GATT/NUS transport surface
description: Why this exists: the standard Meshtastic mobile app must discover and connect to the LICHEN node over the expected local BLE surface. What needs to be done: implement or adapt the Zephyr BLE service/advertising name/UUID/characteristics/security behavior expected by Meshtastic apps, reusing existing gateway BLE plumbing where correct and replacing LICHEN-only NUS assumptions where necessary. Acceptance criteria: advertised BLE identity is discoverable by Meshtastic app scanners; app can pair/connect to the expected service; RX/TX paths move framed bytes into the adapter; transport handles reconnect and MTU constraints; unsupported wired/serial paths remain unaffected.
notes: 2026-06-30 implementation evidence: added Meshtastic-compatible Zephyr BLE GATT surface in lichen/apps/gateway/src/ble_meshtastic.c/.h, gated by CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE. Service UUID 6ba1b218-15a8-461f-9fa8-5dcae273eafd; ToRadio write/write-without-response f75c76d2-129e-4dad-a1dd-7866124401e7; FromRadio read 2c55e69e-4993-11ed-b878-0242ac120002; FromNum read/write/notify ed9da18c-a800-4f66-a670-aa7547e34453. meshtastic_compat.conf enables codec + Meshtastic BLE, disables NUS for product-mode exclusivity, sets CONFIG_BT_ATT_PREPARE_COUNT=4 for 504-byte ToRadio long writes with MTU 247. Implementation uses fixed static queues/buffers only, rejects oversized ToRadio and serial StreamAPI prefix at offset zero, validates protobuf before queueing, supports ATT prepare/execute write path, FromRadio long-read EOF semantics, FromNum little-endian read/write/notify, reconnect cleanup, and propagates advertising errors. Created follow-up project-LICHEN-t2hn.22 for shared native/Meshtastic BLE advertising/service owner because coexistence is intentionally not solved in this first surface. EC2 final verification: west build -b r1_neo/nrf52840 -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/build-r1-neo-gateway-meshtastic-ble-final4 lichen/apps/gateway --pristine=always -- -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=meshtastic_compat.conf PASS. Config evidence: CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE=y, CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE unset, queue depth 4, CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_CODEC=y, CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1, CONFIG_BT_ATT_PREPARE_COUNT=4, CONFIG_BT_L2CAP_TX_MTU=247, CONFIG_BT_DEVICE_NAME="LICHEN". Memory: FLASH 247096 B / 1 MB (23.56%), RAM 78104 B / 256 KB (29.79%); arm size text 241072 data 6022 bss 72479 dec 319573. Review evidence: Hume final PASS no P0/P1/P2; Nash final PASS no P0/P1/P2 after FromNum slot tracking/prepare-count fixes; Gauss final PASS no P0/P1/P2 after stream-prefix/coexistence follow-up fixes. Earlier review findings fixed: FromNum write support, delayed FromRadio pop for long reads, ToRadio long writes, advertising error propagation, BT_MAX_CONN=1 gating, scan-response short name, offset-zero stream-prefix check, CONFIG_BT_ATT_PREPARE_COUNT=4, FromRadio exact-boundary EOF, FromNum retained-slot recovery cursor.
close_reason: Completed: Meshtastic BLE GATT service surface implemented for gateway Meshtastic compatibility mode, R1 build passed, follow-up coexistence Bead created, and three final code reviews passed.
